rationale: Only 2 corpus points in the 'Principal/Director+' bucket, both from Salesforce/CoreWeave, and both are management titles (CoreWeave 'Manager, Technical Support Engineer' $198K-$264K; Salesforce Principal/Director-level range $221.9K-$426.9K), not IC 'Staff' roles - a title/level mismatch with what this cell is meant to represent. Current model base p50=$170K is well below this thin, management-skewed sample, which is expected since Staff-IC pay should trail Director/Manager pay, but the sample is too thin and title-mismatched to treat as solid grounding. Keep low.
